name: Raw Mushroom Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse mushrooms well and remove the stems.
2. Mix together the cream cheese, deviled ham, chopped olives, onion salt, garlic salt, dry mustard, pepper, and pimento in a bowl.
3. Spoon or pipe the mixture into the mushroom caps.
4. Garnish with additional pimento if desired.
5. Place the prepared mushrooms on a platter and refrigerate until serving time. These can be made up to one day in advance.
